title: Buystarget 2pcs Wooden Wall Thermometer Outdoor Indoor Thermometers Garden Greenhouse Kitchen Wood Grain Hanging Vertical Temperature Meter Monitor Gauge Fahrenheit, Celsius Scales Incubator Room
features: ✅TRADITIONAL & PRECISE – Set of 2 wooden wall thermometers to measure room temperature, with high accuracy.
✅ELEGANT AND SIMPLE DESIGN – Featuring a classic black temperature scale on a natural wooden frame for a timeless look.
✅EXCELLENT VALUE – Offering top-quality craftsmanship and precision, ensuring reliable indoor and outdoor temperature readings.
✅PREMIUM QUALITY GUARANTEE – Manufactured to the highest standards for durability and performance, ensuring long-lasting use.
✅VERSATILE USE – Ideal for homes, offices, gardens, greenhouses, or garages. Perfect for monitoring indoor and outdoor temperatures, including your plants' environment.
description: This set of 2 Traditional Wooden Wall Thermometers is the perfect addition to any space, whether you need to track indoor or outdoor temperatures. Designed for both residential and garden use, these thermometers feature an easy-to-read temperature scale and a red liquid-filled glass tube. The thermometers are accurate to within +/- 1°C and offer a temperature range from -40°C to +50°C. With a clean and simple design, the thermometers are made from high-quality wood, ensuring a durable and attractive look that complements any environment. They can easily be hung in your chosen location with the convenient hanging hole on the back. Suitable for use in home, office, kitchen, garden, or greenhouse, these thermometers provide precise readings to help maintain the ideal temperature for both indoor and outdoor settings. These thermometers are built to last and guarantee accuracy. Simply allow the thermometer a few moments to stabilize after placement for the most accurate temperature reading. Specifications: Temperature Range: -40°C to +50°C (°F equivalent included) Accuracy: +/- 1.0°C @ ambient temperature. Dimensions: 22 x 5 x 0.7 cm. Easy to Hang: Built-in hanging hole for convenient installation.
